products.name: Rotzmeier Safety Containers
products.metaDescription: Explore Rotzmeier safety containers for secure chemical storage, solvent handling, and laboratory safety workflows.
products.overview: Rotzmeier safety containers support secure handling and storage of laboratory chemicals and solvents in demanding research and industrial environments.
features: Built for safe chemical storage and handling
Suitable for laboratory and industrial workflows

caseStudies.title: Safer solvent handling
